acquisition method: the tandem mass spectrometry spectra were acquired using the data-dependent TOP 10 method.
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (TPCK-treated, Worthington Biochemical Corporation).
enrichment method: incubated with CNBr-Activated Sepharose 4 Fast Flow beads (GE Healthcare) coupled with an anti-GFP nanobody.
fractionation method: purified by size-exclusion chromatography on a Superose 6 Increase 10/300 GL column.
instrument: using a Q Exactive mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
labeling: the tandem mass spectrometry data were used to search the NCBI-nr protein database.
reduction reagent: solubilized for 1 h at 4 °C in buffer (50 mM Tris, pH 8.0, 150 mM NaCl, 5 mM dithiothreitol, 1% digitonin).
